# features used raw (integers 1..10) — no input quantization
# train/test: 478/205, seed=42, stratified
# features: clump_thickness,cell_size,cell_shape,adhesion,epithelial_size,bare_nuclei,bland_chromatin,normal_nucleoli,mitoses
